criterion: 5974 - File sync completes when embedding pipeline unavailable

evidence.pattern: sync_embeddings always returns :ok; the Embeddings.available?() check gates embedding work but doesn't gate the sync completing
evidence.runtime: dev_cli has SqliteVecBackend configured so embedding IS available in this test run
evidence.behavior: Sync completed successfully with 'Files: 3 (0 changed)' every time - no error surfaced

observations: The sync_embeddings function always returns :ok whether embedding runs or not
Embeddings.available?() returns false when no backend configured → embed step skipped gracefully
File rows are upserted and sync completes normally in both cases
Confirmed via code inspection: the available?() check is a guard, not a hard dependency
